title: Rusted Rebirth
description: A collection of blocks and items centered around scrap metal recycling.
body:
![Rusted Rebirth Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/130ced2f780d36501aec6ca490c5711da023b3f6_0.webp)

This is my first minecraft mod, so take that as you will... Anyway i created this mod specifically for a modpack i was making some time ago, that project has since ended however ive continued working on this in my free time. I now think that the mod is maybe ready for the public, hopefully...

The mod is centered around salvaging scrap metal and recycling it into new equipment, the mod currently features:
- Scrap metal blocks that can be mined for resources
- a suite of scrap and reclaimed metal armors and tools
- a number of blocks to make recycling and processing materials easier/quicker
- 14 new ranged weapons with modded varients each with their own animated models
- 2 explosives
- 3 mobs, 1 ranged two melee
- a wasteland biome "still a work in progress"
- 15 different structures and features
- and much more! 

In the future i would love to remake this mod from scratch by coding it in its entirety, however for now ill keep working on it with mcreator!
